statement: Pressure is represented by second-order Riesz transforms applied to the quadratic velocity tensor.
Pi_plus is the angular projector onto the local maximal-stretching eigenbranch near the degeneracy set Sigma.
The commutator between the singular angular projector and the smooth Riesz multiplier is the proposed source of pressure-coherence loss near Sigma.
Calderon-Zygmund boundedness controls pressure at the critical scale but gives no alpha-positive subcritical gain.
A usable pressure-flux estimate must improve critical control to a D_r^(1+alpha) type gain for some alpha > 0.
